name: Altitude International Holdings, Inc.
summary: Altitude International Holdings, Inc. provides custom built simulated altitude chambers and position specific protocols in the United States. The company's products include extreme environmental chambers that provide the exact range of extreme temperatures, humidity, and oxygen levels; and altitude training controls. It designs, develops, manufactures, and installs simulated altitude athletic equipment. The company was formerly known as Altitude International, Inc. and changed its name to Altitude International Holdings, Inc. in August 2020. Altitude International Holdings, Inc. is based in Port Saint Lucie, Florida.
